summary: Comprehensive testing of new Pulse Auto-Pilot feature. Backend: 30/30 pytest passed (100%) covering auth guards on all 6 endpoints, wallet seeding/idempotency, round-up math (13.40→14 with +0.60), whole-riyal no round-up (20.00→20, +0.00), insufficient balance (5000 SAR) → 400, invalid amounts (0/-5/-0.01) → 422, settings range enforcement (rejects 0.1/5.0/0.24/3.01 → 422), tick disabled → 400, tick enabled deducts+invests correctly, tick insufficient → 400, AI-insight returns source='ai' with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY and pushes AI-INSIGHT log, reset restores state. Regression pass on /student/login, /student/me, /wallet/me, /development/catalog, /contact, /advisor/login. Frontend E2E via Playwright: unauth /auto-pilot → redirect to /student-login; login S1001; header-autopilot-btn nav works; all 3 balance cards + purchase simulator (6 merchant buttons + custom) + Auto-Pilot controls (toggle, slider, tick, insight) + dark terminal + transactions list visible with correct testids; custom purchase 13.40 → balance 986.00 + investment 0.60 + PURCHASE log; toggle ON + manual tick → AUTOPILOT-TICK log + 'استثمار تلقائي' transaction; AI insight → AI-INSIGHT log appears; reset restores 1000/0 and clears transactions.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py now exceeds 2000 lines — strongly recommend modularising (auth, advisor, student, autopilot, ai routes) as flagged in iter2.

Auto-Pilot round-up logic in server.py uses math.floor/ceil + epsilon 0.005 for whole-riyal detection — correct for standard inputs, but consider Decimal for full precision safety if amount ranges grow.

AutopilotPurchaseIn caps amount at 10000 (Field le=10000), so genuinely large 'insufficient balance' inputs (e.g. 99999) return 422 not 400. Behaviour is reasonable — just noting the range: [gt=0, le=10000].
GET /autopilot/me both fetches AND seeds on first hit — good idempotency observed in tests.

Frontend AutoPilotPage 15s heartbeat when autopilot enabled will fire /autopilot/tick from the browser — this is intentional per main agent note; be aware it can silently drain balance during long-lived sessions.
Reset uses window.confirm() — acceptable for demo, but consider a shadcn AlertDialog for a production feel.
All new endpoints correctly enforce Bearer student JWT (401 on missing token) — confirmed in TestAuthGuards.
MongoDB $slice caps transactions to 100 and ai_logs to 80 — good hygiene.
test_credentials: Student S1001/nabd1234 used for autopilot tests; Advisor advisor/nabd1234 for regression.
seed_data_creation: Autopilot state auto-seeded/reset per test via /autopilot/reset (idempotent). No persistent test data left behind — final Playwright step resets S1001 wallet to 1000/0.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auto-Pilot state lives in Mongo 'pulse_autopilot' keyed by student_id. Use /api/autopilot/reset to restore fresh state (balance=1000, inv=0, empty tx, 2 seed ai_logs). Amount is Pydantic-bound [gt=0, le=10000] so 'insufficient' tests must use value ≤10000. Daily amount range [0.25, 3.0]. AI insight can take ~10s via emergent Claude — allow 15s timeout in UI tests. Frontend heartbeat auto-fires tick every 15s when autopilot toggle is ON — either disable toggle at end of a test or accept extra ticks.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs found. New Auto-Pilot feature is production-ready and existing endpoints unaffected.
